parsed_review.summary: CP00-685 is a descriptor-only RP22 External Integrations I P07 "Permission And Audit Binding" failure slice over 10 planned units (RP22.P07.M05.S05-S14). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level claim is honest and fully supported, and the pack does NOT overclaim production/runtime/enterprise trust: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status in_progress; construction-inspection verdict PENDING_REVIEW; adjudication "production ready: no". Implementation verified: registry CP685 pack-binding/requirements (registry.js:820-877) match the baseline exactly (risk A, 10 units, distribution 8 failure_recovery/1 security_audit/1 implementation, micro-title Permission And Audit Binding); the descriptor factory (service.js:3071-3115) emits 10 case-set rows each descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, raw_payload_included=false, with every *_runtime_opened and cross_tenant_access_allowed false; the descriptor/coverage/projection validators (validators.js:881-907, 1895-2039) hard-check binding, per-row flags, all descriptor-only flags true, all runtime flags false, claude_is_final_approval false, and the shared CP666 no-write attestation for every pack incl. 685. Tests (model.test.js:966-993, 995-1044) assert descriptor validity and that BOTH contract files equal the projection, importing the 5 required CP685 exports through ../src/index.js (substantiating index_export_check via wildcard re-export). The validator script (validate-rp22-external-integrations-i-contract.mjs:324-546) wires CP685 coverage+descriptor+projection validation with assert.equal(valid,true) and writes both contracts from one projection (explaining their identical content). No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold: the descriptor carries only entity field-name shapes and boolean flags — no tokens, secrets, credentials, or raw payloads. Hermes patterns are deterministic control-plane review-packet/receipt only (hermes_runtime_opened=false, runtime_receipt_emitted=false, command_result=pending_until_closeout_pack_validation), not product runtime. Claude remains read-only and non-final (promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false). Review-evidence hygiene per CP178+ hardening passes: readiness auth preflight succeeded (exit 0, well-formed JSON, 1449B stdout); no prior raw-output/receipt exists (first valid attempt); changed-file-scope reports zero omitted active untracked implementation files and correctly segregates unrelated dirty files. Plan and next-pack-queue confirm CP00-685 is the live cursor with consistent range and next=CP00-686/RP22.P07.M05.S15. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. This receipt is an independent read-only review, not final human/enterprise-trust approval, which remains closed outside this receipt.
